creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Wed Feb 20 01:45:57 2013
New Revision: 312609
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312609

Log:
  - All things found in pypi should use CHEESESHOP for MASTER_SITES
  - Added some options to extend functionality
  - Added MAN pages
  
  PR:		ports/176273
  Submitted by:	Mark Felder <feld@feld.me> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/audio/beets/Makefile
  head/audio/beets/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/beets/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/audio/beets/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/beets/Makefile	Tue Feb 19 23:53:07 2013	(r312608)
+++ head/audio/beets/Makefile	Wed Feb 20 01:45:57 2013	(r312609)
@@ -3,7 +3,9 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	beets
 PORTVERSION=	1.0.0
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	audio python
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 
 MAINTAINER=	feld@feld.me
 COMMENT=	A media library management system for obsessive-compulsive music geeks
@@ -13,23 +15,37 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}muta
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}musicbrainzngs>=0:${PORTSDIR}/audio/py-musicbrainzngs \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}munkres>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-munkres
 
+MAN1=	beet.1
+MAN5=	beetsconfig.5
+
 USE_PYTHON=	2.7+
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
-USE_GITHUB=	yes
-GH_ACCOUNT=	sampsyo
-GH_TAGNAME=	v${PORTVERSION}
-GH_COMMIT=	d06ca1e
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	CHROMA FFMPEG REPLAYGAIN
+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=
+
+CHROMA_DESC=	Audio Fingerprinting Plugin
+REPLAYGAIN_DESC=	Normalize audio loudness
+
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MCHROMA}
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}acoustid>=0:${PORTSDIR}/audio/py-acoustid
+.endif
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MFFMPEG}
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	ffmpeg>=0:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/ffmpeg1
+.endif
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MREPLAYGAIN}
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	mp3gain>=0:${PORTSDIR}/audio/mp3gain \
+		aacgain>=0:${PORTSDIR}/audio/aacgain
+.endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
-do-build:
-	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${PYTHON_CMD} \
-		${PYSETUP} build)
-
-do-install:
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/beet ${PREFIX}/bin/
-	${INSTALL} -d ${PYTHONPREFIX_SITELIBDIR}/beets
-	cd ${WRKSRC}/build/lib && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} \* ${PYTHONPREFIX_SITELIBDIR}/
+post-install:
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/beet.1 ${PREFIX}/man/man1/
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/beetsconfig.5 ${PREFIX}/man/man5/
 
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Modified: head/audio/beets/distinfo
==============================================================================

+++ head/audio/beets/distinfo	Wed Feb 20 01:45:57 2013	(r312609)

-SIZE (beets-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 529109

+SIZE (beets-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 532807
